meta.title: Theme Parks | We Love Adventure Travels
meta.description: Plan your Disney or Universal vacation with Victoria Smith — skip the stress and let a certified Disney Vacation Planner handle every detail.

pageHero.title: THEME PARKS
pageHero.description: Disney World, Disneyland, Universal Studios — Victoria is a certified planner who knows how to get the most out of every single day at the parks.

section1.heading: Disney World & Disneyland
paragraphs: Disney vacations are deceptively complex. Between park reservations, Lightning Lane bookings, dining reservations that open 60 days out, and resort choices that change your whole experience — a first-time visitor (or even a returning one) can quickly feel overwhelmed.

Victoria is an Authorized Disney Vacation Planner. She knows the difference between Value, Moderate, and Deluxe resorts — and when each one is actually worth it. She'll map out your days, pre-book your dining, and make sure you hit everything that matters to your family.
And her service is completely free to you — Disney pays her commission directly.

section2.heading: Universal Studios & Epic Universe
paragraphs: Universal Orlando has grown into a multi-day destination all on its own. The Wizarding World of Harry Potter, Jurassic World, and the brand-new Epic Universe are experiences that kids (and adults) don't forget.

Victoria will help you decide how many days you actually need, whether the Express Pass is worth it for your group, which on-site hotel benefits matter, and how to combine Universal with Disney without burning everyone out.

cards.title: Going without a plan
cards.text: Disney and Universal reward preparation. Guests without reservations and a day plan spend hours in lines they could have avoided.

cards.title: Staying off-property to save money
cards.text: On-site hotels at Disney and Universal include perks — early park entry, transportation, and room-only discounts — that often make them the better value.

cards.title: Booking too many parks in one trip
cards.text: Trying to do six parks in five days leaves everyone exhausted and underwhelmed. Victoria helps you pick what's actually right for your family.

ctaBanner.heading: Your Magic Starts With One Conversation
ctaBanner.paragraph: Tell Victoria your dates, your kids' ages, and what everyone's most excited about — she'll build the itinerary that makes it all happen.
